chain.title: From Symptoms to the Pharmacy Counter

title: Chain 1/8: Feel Sick at Home
scene: 你早上起来喉咙痛，跟室友说。（对话链：药店）

turns.en: You sound hoarse. Coming down with something?

turns.cn: 喉咙痛，可能要去药店买点药。
turns.en: Sore throat. I might need to hit the pharmacy.
We have Tylenol. Want one first?

turns.cn: 先吃一片，下午还不好就去药店。
turns.en: I'll take one. If I'm not better by afternoon, I'll go.
Drink water. Masks are in the drawer.

chain.title: From Symptoms to the Pharmacy Counter

title: Chain 2/8: OTC Consultation
scene: 下午你到药店柜台咨询感冒药。（对话链：药店）

turns.cn: 你好，我感冒流鼻涕，有什么推荐？
turns.en: Hi, I have a cold and a runny nose. What do you recommend?

turns.cn: 这款 DayQuil 白天用，不犯困。
turns.en: Try DayQuil for daytime. It won't make you drowsy.
What about at night?
NyQuil helps you sleep. Don't drive after taking it.
How many times a day?

turns.cn: 每四到六小时一次，不要超过四剂。
turns.en: Every four to six hours, no more than four doses.

chain.title: From Symptoms to the Pharmacy Counter

title: Chain 3/8: Doctor Sends Prescription
scene: 症状加重，医生电子处方发到了药店。（对话链：药店）

turns.cn: 有您的电子处方，姓张对吧？
turns.en: We have an e-prescription for you. Zhang, right?

turns.cn: 对，王医生刚开的，要多久能取？
turns.en: Yes, Dr. Wang just sent it. How long to fill?
Fifteen minutes. Please wait nearby.
Is there a generic? Something cheaper?
Yes, same ingredients, lower copay.
Generic is fine. Thank you.

chain.title: From Symptoms to the Pharmacy Counter

title: Chain 4/8: Ask About Side Effects
scene: 取药时，药师跟你说明用法。（对话链：药店）

turns.en: Twice daily after meals for seven days.
Any side effects I should watch for?

turns.cn: 可能胃不舒服，饭中吃更好。
turns.en: May upset your stomach. Take it with food.
Can I drink alcohol?
Avoid alcohol while on this medication.
Got it. Thank you.

chain.title: From Symptoms to the Pharmacy Counter

title: Chain 5/8: Insurance Copay
scene: 结账时保险自付比预期高，你询问原因。（对话链：药店）

turns.en: Your copay is twenty-five dollars.
It was only ten last time. Why did it go up?

turns.cn: 可能 deductible 还没满足，我查一下。
turns.en: Your deductible may not be met yet. Let me check.

turns.cn: 好，如果太贵我能先不买吗？
turns.en: Okay. If it's too much, can I skip it for now?
Yes. We'll hold the prescription for thirty days.
I'll pay today. Thanks.

chain.title: From Symptoms to the Pharmacy Counter

title: Chain 6/8: Flu Shot
scene: 顺便在药店预约打流感疫苗。（对话链：药店）

turns.cn: 能打流感疫苗吗？现在有空吗？
turns.en: Can I get a flu shot? Any openings now?
Yes. Please fill out this consent form.
Is it covered by insurance?

turns.cn: 大多数计划免费，我扫您的卡。
turns.en: Most plans cover it free. I'll scan your card.
Left arm is okay?
Sure. Roll up your sleeve.

chain.title: From Symptoms to the Pharmacy Counter

title: Chain 7/8: Buy First Aid Kit
scene: 你在货架区买家用急救包。（对话链：药店）

turns.en: Can I help you find something?

turns.cn: 我想买一个家用急救包。
turns.en: I'm looking for a home first-aid kit.

turns.cn: 这款含绷带、消毒液和创可贴。
turns.en: This one has bandages, antiseptic, and band-aids.
Do you carry thermometers?
Yes, digital ones are behind the counter.
I'll take both. Can I pay by card?

chain.title: From Symptoms to the Pharmacy Counter

title: Chain 8/8: Refill Reminder
scene: 一周后药店打电话提醒续药。（对话链：药店）

turns.cn: 您好，您的处方药快吃完了，要续吗？
turns.en: Hi, your prescription is running low. Ready for a refill?
Yes, please. Same generic.

turns.cn: 医生授权还有两次，今天能取。
turns.en: Your doctor authorized two more refills. Ready today.

turns.cn: 我下班后来取，大概六点。
turns.en: I'll pick it up after work, around six.
Okay. We'll hold it for you.
Thank you.
